data.title: Fed Governor steps down, giving Trump chance to influence central bank. Trump urges for rate cuts and Powell's resignation.
data.description: The resignation comes amidst President Trump's public calls for the central bank to reduce interest rates and insistence on Jerome H. Powell, the chair, to resign.

data.title: Prior to deadline, companies rushed goods from duty-free warehouses to save on tariffs and hedge costs.
data.description: Importers successfully reduced the tariff rates they paid by storing inventory in bonded warehouses or foreign trade zones. This strategy helped them minimize costs and navigate the changing tariffs effectively.

data.title: Trump Media reports second quarter 2025 results: $3.1 billion financial assets, $2.4 billion Bitcoin treasury, $2.3 million positive cash flow, utility token rewards system planned.
data.description: Trump Media and Technology Group Corp. reported financial results for the fiscal quarter ending on June 30, 2025, with financial assets of approximately $3.1 billion, showing an 800% year-on-year growth. The company raised nearly $2.4 billion for its Bitcoin treasury strategy, resulting in a Bitcoin treasury of approximately $2 billion in July 2025, making it one of the largest Bitcoin treasuries of any public firm. Trump Media achieved positive operating cash flow in the second quarter, with $2.3 million in cash flow from operating activities. The company plans to enhance its platforms, launch new fintech products, and pursue mergers and acquisitions. Additionally, Trump Media plans to implement a rewards system with a utility token.
